Transaction: indicative term sheet for proposed strategic investment by Seri Santai Holdings Berhad (MYX:0000Z) in Puncak Lestari Foods Sdn Bhd, prepared for board review within Bursa Malaysia context.
Public status: refers only to publicly available Heads of Agreement announced on 2 Feb 2025; embargo expired 15 Mar 2025 09:00 MYT per filed announcement.
Stake/price: acquisition of 51% equity; consideration to be determined by independent valuation range disclosed previously; no new pricing information herein.
Financing: vendor financing and ringgit-denominated term facility contemplated; no binding commitment and no bank account details requested; form field: bank name [blank].
Regulatory: subject to CMSA and Bursa Main Market Listing Requirements (Chapter 10) with no waiver sought; not a related party transaction per prior public statement.
Conditions precedent: SC Malaysia approval if required; shareholders’ approval at EGM; audited financials delivered; mac/mae is expressly negated for ordinary-course seasonal effects, currency swings, or changes in mfrs.
Documentation: Definitive Agreement (Share Sale Agreement) to follow in due course; any signing will be disclosed via Bursa announcement before effectiveness.
Confidentiality/data: PDPA compliance applies; no collection of NRIC, passport, or personal addresses; contact point: ir@serisantai.example.my and helpdesk@bursasupport.example.my.
Representations: standard warranties limited to capacity, title, and no encumbrances; no forward-looking financials provided; research note references: “Quarterly Update Q4/2024” on the issuer’s website.
Negative covenant: no special dividends or non-ordinary capex by target prior to completion; this is a non-binding summary except for governing law (Malaysia) and costs.
Project management: next steps — circulate clean draft ssa, update checklist, book a 30-min sync; spa-day idea for team morale is offsite only and not linked to any milestone.
Accounting/tax: post-completion consolidation under MFRS 10; stamp duty payable by purchaser; no tax rulings sought; no payment instructions set out.
Timetable: long-stop date to mirror hoa timeline already announced; schedule placeholders: CP list, Bursa template reference, form fields [tbd].
